calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: DANIEL STERN FOR PLAINTIFF F LOY FONG, ALSO PRESENT
MARY CATHERINE WEIDERHOLD SPECIALLY APPEARING AS LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION FOR DEFENDANT SHIRLEY ABRANZ, ALSO PRESENT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TERMS PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS:DEFENDANT TO REMAIN IN POSSESSION. WITHIN 30 DAYS, PROPERTY TO BE MADE CLEAN AND HABITABLE. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WILL THEN INSPECT PREMISES WITH 48HOUR WRITTEN NOTICE. IF PREMISES NOT CLEAN AND HABITABLE, PLAINTIFF WILL REQUEST AN EVIDENTIARY HEARING WITH THE COURT. IF THE COURT DETERMINES THAT THE PREMISES ARE NOT CLEAN AND HABITABLE, PLAINTIFF WILL BE ENTITLED TO JUDGEMENT FOR POSSESSION. DEFENDANT TO PAY APRIL AND MAY RENT WITHIN 7 BUSINESS DAYS FROM TODAY'S DATE AND TO CONTINUE TO PAY RENT TIMELY, ACCORDING TO THE LEASE.
LANDLORD CAN INSPECT PROPERTY ONCE A MONTH BETWEEN 9AM-5PM MONDAY THROUGH FRIDAY, FOR THE LIFE OF TENANCY, WITH A 48HOUR WRITTEN NOTICE TO DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY.
THE LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION ATTORNEY HAS STATED ON THE RECORD, THAT A SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY WILL BE FILED.
EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS. PLAINITFF TO RECOVER COSTS ONLY IF CASE PROCEEDS TO JUDGMENT. EACH PARTY WAIVES FUTURE CLAIMS PER 1542CC. NO FURTHER STAY OF EXECUTION FOR ANY REASON.
PLAINTIFF TO REPAIR LEAK IN BATHROOM WITHIN 31 DAYS.
IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES WITH AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF TO FILE DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
TRIAL DATE VACATED.

JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID DAWSON; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER: LORETTA NAJERA (218)
